data.title: Solana Layer-2 Scaler Defies Crypto Market Slump, Surges 41% This Week Amid Multiple Exchange Listings
data.description:
A Solana (SOL) layer-2 scaling solution defied the wider crypto market slump and surged by more than 41% this week following a flurry of recent exchange listings. Solayer (LAYER) is a blockchain network designed for high throughput and near-zero latency. The network bills itself as “infinitely scalable” and is designed to handle 1 million transactions […]
The post Solana Layer-2 Scaler Defies...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/14/solana-layer-2-scaler-defies-crypto-market-slump-and-surges-41-this-week-amid-multiple-recent-exchange-listings/

data.title: U.S. Senate Approves Republican-Led Spending Bill, Prevents Shutdown
data.description:
The U.S. Senate passes a Republican-led spending bill, preventing a government shutdown with bipartisan support and significant financial changes.
source: https://coincu.com/326552-senate-passes-republican-spending-bill

data.title: New Dog-Themed Memecoin DOGINME Rips Following Addition to Coinbase Listing Roadmap
data.description:
A recently launched dog-themed memecoin is skyrocketing after being added to Coinbase’s listing roadmap. In a new thread on the social media platform X, the top US-based crypto exchange platform by volume says that it has added the meme asset doginme (DOGINME) to its listing roadmap. Coinbase’s listing roadmap is used to increase transparency and […]
The post New Dog-Themed Memecoin DOGINME...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/14/new-dog-themed-memecoin-doginme-rips-following-addition-to-coinbase-listing-roadmap/

data.title: Hyperliquid’s mystery 50x ETH whale is now betting on LINK
data.description:
The cryptocurrency trader whose ultra-leveraged Ether (ETH) trade tested Hyperliquid’s limits on March 12 has entered another multimillion-dollar position, this time in Chainlink (LINK), onchain data shows. On March 14, the anonymous whale, referred to on X as “ETH 50x Big Guy,” took out long positions in LINK worth approximately $31 million with 10 times leverage, according to Lookonchain, a...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/hyperliquid-mystery-50x-eth-whale-bet-link?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Excessive fundraising weakens VC confidence in crypto startups despite regulatory improvements
data.description:
Venture capital funding for crypto startups has yet to rebound in line with recent regulatory clarity in the U.S. despite showing signs of recovery in the months following President Donald Trump’s election. According to analysts, the excessive capital inflows during 2021 and 2022 did not result in proportional returns for investors, which has damaged confidence […]
The post Excessive...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/excessive-fundraising-weakens-vc-confidence-in-crypto-startups-despite-regulatory-improvements/

data.title: Dow Jones Records Largest Weekly Decline Since 2023
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Dow Jones Industrial Average has experienced its most significant weekly drop since March 2023. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq indices have both fallen for the fourth consecutive week.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Sees Significant Gains as Major Indices Rise
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. stock market closed with notable gains on Friday. The Dow Jones Industrial Average increased by 1.65%, the S&P 500 rose by 2.13%, and the Nasdaq Composite climbed 2.61%. Among individual stocks, Nvidia saw a rise of over 5%, Tesla gained 3.86%, and Apple experienced an increase of approximately 1.8%.

data.title: VanEck looks to get SEC’s greenlight for first AVAX ETF

data.title: Stablecoins Supply Up By $20 Billion – The Key To Bitcoin’s Next Move?
data.description:
Early in 2025, there was a significant surge in the stablecoin market, with a $20 billion increase in total supply. With a 10% increase from January, the total supply now stands at almost $205 billion. The spike, according to data from Glassnode, comes after a dip in late 2024, when the supply of stablecoins fell from $187 billion to $185 billion. Related Reading: Bitcoin And S&P Decline...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/stablecoin/stablecoins-supply-up-by-20-billion-the-key-to-bitcoins-next-move/
